name: plexium-tools
description: Install, set up, and verify Plexium repositories from inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Install and operate Plexium from inside Codex
interface.longDescription: Thin Codex plugin wrapper around the Plexium CLI for install, setup, verification, retrieval, and MCP guidance.
defaultPrompt: Install Plexium if it is missing and verify the binary.
Set up Plexium for Codex in this repository.
Verify that Plexium is ready for Codex in this repository.
Query the Plexium wiki for a topic in this repository.
